highlights.text: My lean today we head higher to contest some of these.
I specified these yesterday, stating: “My general lean for tomorrow is bears control.
This is because follows the same cycle which I call the two siblings: Elevator down sell (the first sibling)-into-short squeeze (the second sibling).
ES cycles between two types of price action over and over: 1) Elevator down sells (this is where ES sells in a non-stop straight line).
These occur after elevator down sells and see ES put in a face-ripping squeeze.
These are caused by my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.

I wrote on Monday at 4pm that: “ If we lose today’s lows and don’t recover very quickly, we begin a leg down that should see 6605-10 minimum but take it level to level.” We lost this Monday evening and went to elevator down 50 points by 10am Tuesday morning, we hit 6605-10.
This was a deep elevator down sell, so readers know what comes next.
The Failed Breakdown and short squeeze.

I wrote yesterday: “Some supports to watch would be 6605-10 and 6593.” We hit 6593 by 11am to set the low of day, recovered 6605-10 (Failed Breakdown), and put in the short squeeze to 6690ish yesterday before dipping last evening.
Shockingly, we had 5 Failed Breakdowns and one Breakdown Short just from Friday into yesterday.

post_title: Nvidia Earnings After 4pm. Volatility Coming For SPX, But What Way? November 20th Plan
